# Clear The Clutter Junk Removal

Fast, friendly, and affordable junk removal in Oshkosh, Appleton, Fond Du Lac, and surrounding areas. Our team provides fast and affordable solutions to help you reclaim your space. Whether you need to get rid of old furniture, appliances, construction debris or clearing out entire properties. We ensure a hassle-free experience. Contact us today to learn how we can assist with your junk removal needs.

✔️ Same-day service available

✔️ Residential & commercial junk removal

✔️ Transparent pricing — no hidden fees

[Get a Free Quote Today](https://www.cleartheclutterjunkremoval.com/contact-us)

[Call or Text 920-424-9827](tel:920-424-9827)

## Affordable Junk Removal

Just point to what you want gone — we’ll handle the rest.

​

Our experienced crew will carefully remove items from your home or business, haul them away for donation, recycling, or disposal, and even sweep up after we’re done.

​

Whether you’re clearing out a garage, replacing old furniture, or tackling a full estate cleanout, your space will be clean and ready for whatever comes next.

[Get An Estimate](https://www.cleartheclutterjunkremoval.com/contact-us)

## Recent Junk Removal Projects

![Junk Removal Banner](https://www.aaarousse.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/jgr_al_header.webp)

# Quick Junk Removal in Oshkosh, WI

Let AAA Rousse Clear Out And Clean Up Your Oshkosh Home or Business Property

## AAA Rousse Junk Removal in Oshkosh, WI

AAA Rousse Junk Removal in Oshkosh, WI, can haul appliances and heavy furniture. We provide junk removal and trash cleanup for residential, commercial, and industrial properties, including retail store cleanouts. We do it all. We are good at it. Ask us about other services we provide.

Our crew completes the heavy lifting in a quick, safe way, leaving you with a finished job and zero stress.

![AAA Rousse crew](https://www.aaarousse.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/newcrew-aaa_1-compressed_r.webp)

## Call or Book Online In Under 60 Seconds

Call AAA Rousse at 920-519-2282 and speak to a live person today for service in Oshkosh, and all of Winnebago County. Pricing is based on weight and load-up time and accessibility. We do residential and commercial property cleanouts.

**Business hours:** Monday–Sunday from 7AM EST to 8PM EST.

We accept the following payment methods:

[Give us a Call](tel:+19205192282) – or – [Book Online](https://www.aaarousse.com/book-online.html)

![](https://www.aaarousse.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/boulder_cards.png)

## Eco-Friendly Waste Disposal in Winnebago County

Our mission is to make junk removal cleaner and greener with the help of Oshkosh waste management systems. Our team recycles usable items, donates them when possible, and minimizes landfill loads through proper disposal of trash and debris. The cleaner Oshkosh we want starts with smarter removal.

Whenever possible, we donate to trusted organizations like:

![The Salvation Army Eco Friendly](https://www.aaarousse.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/the_salvation_army_icon.webp)
